title: Strong blocks
description: This mod adds blocks, which can withstand multiple tnt blasts.
body:
I have always wished for some stronger blocks to build my base with(when i was playing with friends with gun mods), and thats why i created this mod. It adds 9 new blocks with different stats.

## Blocks:
### Stone
Durability:1



<details>
<summary>craft</summary>

![armored stone block craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01bde86333166c81cceef9c4e3a4cd3165ec4a14.png)

</details>





### Deepslate
Durability:2

<details>
<summary>craft</summary>

![Armored deepslate block craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2f24398dc06e03451c585a0d15f0602ff123e90.png)

</details>




### Copper
Durability:3

<details>
<summary>craft</summary>

![Armored copper block craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5474178959171750ecf3f158433c3f82c80791ea.png)

### Iron
Durability:5

<details>
<summary>craft</summary>

![Armored iron block craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8316ecd694babd0d098240807147c18b921d43a9.png)

### Gold
Durability:7

<details>
<summary>craft</summary>

![Armored gold block craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7f9b92ae5c8473a90ed1e2ba851f7085bc20c52.png)

### Emerald
Durability:7

Effect: Every block, placed in 3x3 cube around this block increases chance to completely ignore the explosion.

<details>
<summary>craft</summary>

![Armored emerald block craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9cad29b78804efef5302c8dcb904bf535e01a41.png)

</details>

Durability:9

<details>

## ITEMS
## 
### Repair hammer
RMB with needed resourse in your inventory to repair.

<details>
<summary>craft</summary>

![Hammer craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a31655b6f3cd74d60e06b1e95f530c8416ddc33a.png)

</details>


### Block picker
RMB on the block you placed to pick it up. Doesn't work if the block was blown up/placed by other player.

<details>
<summary>craft</summary>

![Block picker craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1613fd7965f41a42c67b25a485e644da94492db.png)

</details>
